title: Jeddah, Makkah — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Jeddah, Makkah: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Jeddah is a city in Makkah with a population of 4,697,000. Saudi Arabia’s second-largest city and main port on the Red Sea, known as the gateway to Mecca.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
